01039|     // Step 5: GoPlus address security — checks contract against malicious/phishing/blacklist databases
01040|     // This is what catches tokens MetaMask flags as "Malicious"
01041|     for (const { address: addr } of tokens) {
01042|       const key = addr.toLowerCase()
01043|       const existing = result.get(key)
01044|       // Skip if already confirmed high-risk
01045|       if (existing?.riskLevel === 'high' && existing?.isSpam) continue
01046|       try {
01047|         const res = await fetch(
01048|           `https://api.gopluslabs.io/api/v1/address_security/${addr}?chain_id=${chainId}`,
01049|           { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(6000) }
01050|         )
01051|         if (!res.ok) continue
01052|         const data = await res.json()
01053|         if (data.code !== 1 || !data.result) continue
01054|         const r = data.result as Record<string, string>
01055| 
01056|         const flags: string[] = [...(existing?.flags || [])]
01057|         let riskLevel: TokenRisk['riskLevel'] = existing?.riskLevel || 'safe'
01058|         const bump = (level: TokenRisk['riskLevel']) => {
01059|           const order = ['safe', 'low', 'medium', 'high']
01060|           if (order.indexOf(level) > order.indexOf(riskLevel)) riskLevel = level
01061|         }
01062| 
01063|         if (r.malicious_contract === '1') { flags.push('Malicious contract'); bump('high') }
01064|         if (r.phishing_activities === '1') { flags.push('Phishing'); bump('high') }
01065|         if (r.blackmail_activities === '1') { flags.push('Blackmail'); bump('high') }
01066|         if (r.stealing_attack === '1') { flags.push('Stealing attack'); bump('high') }
01067|         if (r.fake_token === '1') { flags.push('Fake token'); bump('high') }
01068|         if (r.honeypot_related_address === '1') { flags.push('Honeypot related'); bump('high') }
01069|         if (r.mixer === '1') { flags.push('Mixer'); bump('medium') }
01070|         if (r.sanctioned === '1') { flags.push('Sanctioned'); bump('high') }
01071|         if (r.money_laundering === '1') { flags.push('Money laundering'); bump('high') }
01072|         if (r.reinit === '1') { flags.push('Reinitialized contract'); bump('medium') }
01073|         if (r.cybercrime === '1') { flags.push('Cybercrime'); bump('high') }
01074|         if (r.number_of_malicious_contracts_created && parseInt(r.number_of_malicious_contracts_created) > 0) {
01075|           flags.push(`Creator made ${r.number_of_malicious_contracts_created} malicious contracts`); bump('high')
01076|         }
01077| 
01078|         if (flags.length > (existing?.flags?.length || 0)) {
01079|           result.set(key, {
01080|             isSpam: riskLevel === 'high',
01081|             isHoneypot: existing?.isHoneypot || false,
01082|             riskLevel,
01083|             flags: [...new Set(flags)],
01084|           })
01085|         }
01086|       } catch { /* best-effort */ }
01087|     }
01088| 
01089|     return result
01090|   }
